name: Easy Microwave Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 Jar smooth or crunchy peanut butter (12oz)
recipeInstructions:
Makes approximately 42 pieces
1. In a 1-1/2 quart microwave-proof bowl, melt chocolate and peanut butter on HIGH for 3 minutes.
2. Remove from microwave; stir until will.
3. Add milk, stirring until well blended.
4. Pour mixture into an 8 x 8 inch pan, lined with waxed paper.
5. Refrigerate to chill.
